text: Taylor K (2025). figR: Figure Publishing Scientific Manuscripts. R package version 0.0.0.9000, https://wikisqueaks.github.io/figR.
code: @Manual{,   title = {figR: Figure Publishing for Scientific Manuscripts},   author = {Kyle Taylor},   year = {2025},   note = {R package version 0.0.0.9000},   url = {https://wikisqueaks.github.io/figR}, }

title: Figure Publishing for Scientific Manuscripts
text: figR eliminates guesswork figure layout sizing scientific journals. provides consistent toolset ensure ggplot2 graphics meet journal requirements. publish_fig() saves plots precise dimensions based column widths. search_journals() helps find specific layout rules (Nature, Cell, Science). set_journal() allows define global target entire script. combine naturally ensure see R exactly appears PDF.

title: Figure Publishing for Scientific Manuscripts

title: Create a new figure script with a unique ID — new_fig_script

what: Save a Publication-Ready Figure with Journal-Specific Dimensions — publish_fig
title: Save a Publication-Ready Figure with Journal-Specific Dimensions — publish_fig
text: Saves ggplot object file using dimensions tailored specific journal's layout. Width given columns spanned. Height given column units unless page = TRUE. Landscape figures treated full-page figures automatically use page-based sizing. Additional ggsave() parameters can passed via ....

title: Save a Publication-Ready Figure with Journal-Specific Dimensions — publish_fig
code: publish_fig(   plot,   filename,   fig_width,   fig_height,   journal = getOption("figR_journal", "nature"),   page = FALSE,   landscape = FALSE,   dpi = 300,   units = "mm",   page_width = NULL,   page_height = NULL,   ncol = NULL,   col_margin = NULL,   row_margin = 5,   ... )

title: Save a Publication-Ready Figure with Journal-Specific Dimensions — publish_fig
text: plot ggplot object save. filename Character vector one output filenames extensions. fig_width Integer. Number columns spanned. fig_height Numeric. Number columns tall (default), fraction page height page = TRUE landscape = TRUE. journal Character. Name journal use default sizing. Defaults "nature" value getOption("figR_journal"). page Logical. TRUE, interpret fig_height fraction page height. Default FALSE. Forced TRUE landscape = TRUE. landscape Logical. TRUE, swap page width height treat figure full-page landscape spread. dpi Numeric. Dots per inch resolution. Default 300. units Character. Units ggsave. Default "mm". page_width Numeric. Portrait page text block width mm. Overrides journal default provided. page_height Numeric. Portrait maximum figure height mm. Overrides journal default provided. ncol Integer. Number columns. Overrides journal default provided. col_margin Numeric. Spacing columns mm. Overrides journal default provided. row_margin Numeric. Spacing rows (vertical gutters) mm. Default 5. ... Additional arguments passed ggsave() (e.g., device, limitsize, bg).

title: Save a Publication-Ready Figure with Journal-Specific Dimensions — publish_fig

what: Search or List Available Journals — search_journals
title: Search or List Available Journals — search_journals
text: Search internal database journals matching text pattern either journal name publisher name. pattern provided, returns entire table journals.

title: Search or List Available Journals — search_journals
Search or List Available Journals — search_journals
text: pattern Character (Optional). text string search (e.g., "nature"). Case-insensitive. NULL (default), returns journals.

title: Search or List Available Journals — search_journals
Search or List Available Journals — search_journals
code: # Show all available journals search_journals() #>    publisher                                  journal page_width #> 1   Elsevier                                     Cell        174 #> 2   Elsevier                              Rhizosphere        180 #> 3  Frontiers       Frontiers in Ecology and Evolution        175 #> 4     Nature                                   Nature        183 #> 5       PLOS                                 PLOS One        190 #> 6      Wiley                    Global Change Biology        178 #> 7  Wiley/ESA                  Ecological Applications        178 #> 8  Wiley/ESA                    Ecological Monographs        178 #> 9  Wiley/ESA                                  Ecology        178 #> 10 Wiley/ESA                                Ecosphere        178 #> 11 Wiley/ESA Frontiers in Ecology and the Environment        178 #> 12 Wiley/NSO                                    Oikos        178 #>    page_height ncol col_margin #> 1          230    2       5.00 #> 2          240    2      10.00 #> 3          240    2       5.00 #> 4          170    2       5.00 #> 5          210    2      10.00 #> 6          240    2       6.00 #> 7          242    2       6.00 #> 8          242    2       6.00 #> 9          242    2       6.00 #> 10         242    2       6.00 #> 11         242    2       6.00 #> 12         231    2       4.66  # Search by Journal Name search_journals("comms") #> No journals found matching 'comms'.  # Search by Publisher search_journals("Elsevier") #>   publisher     journal page_width page_height ncol col_margin #> 1  Elsevier        Cell        174         230    2          5 #> 2  Elsevier Rhizosphere        180         240    2         10

title: Set Default Journal — set_journal
text: Sets global option target journal. prevents needing specify journal argument every call publish_fig().

title: Set Default Journal — set_journal
Set Default Journal — set_journal
List Available Journals — show_journals
text: Returns data frame journal names default figure dimensions available.

title: List Available Journals — show_journals
List Available Journals — show_journals
